zh.lifeSummary: 當Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch於1018年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德波格斯時，他的父親Seigneur et Chatelain de Berghes Gobert III de Berghes-St. Winoch35歲，母親Avicie DE BOURBOURG25歲。他和Aélix DE THEROUANNE至少有1個女兒。他去世於1071年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯波奧梅-利斯-洛格斯享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Winoch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English winche ‘winch, pulley’ (Old English wince), later meaning ‘well’, presumably because a winch would have been used to extract water from a well. The surname is probably a topographic name for someone who lived by a well. Compare Wink . This may also be a topographic name denoting someone who lived by a sharp bend in a river or valley, from a transferred sense of winche ‘winch, pulley’. This term and sense appears to be behind some placenames, such as Wincham (Kent) and Winchbottom (Buckinghamshire).
English: habitational name from East and West Winch (Norfolk). The placenames probably derive from Old English winn ‘pasture, meadow’ + wīc ‘dwelling, specialized farmstead’.

English: perhaps also a nickname from a further transferred use of the Middle English word in sense 1 above, for a lapwing (compare Middle English lapwink ‘lapwing’, Old English hlēapewince) or other bird known for its leaping and twisting flight.

variants.name: Wink
meanings: from Middle English winke, a form of winche ‘winch, pulley’ (Old English wince), later developing the meaning ‘well’, presumably because a winch would have been used to extract water from a well. The surname is probably for someone who lived by a well. This may also be a topographic name for someone who lived by a sharp bend in a river or valley, from a transferred sense of Middle English winke. Compare Winch 1.

perhaps also a nickname from a further transferred use of the Middle English word in sense 1 above, for a lapwing (compare Middle English lapwink ‘lapwing’, Old English hlēapewince) or any bird known for its leaping and twisting flight. See Winch 3.

nameMeanings.name: Wautier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Camille, Antoine, Francois, Marcel, Pascale, Philippe, Remy, Thierry.  Spanish Jose, Jorge, Miguel, Adelina, Altagracia, Ana, Andres, Arnaldo, Artemio, Augusto, Carlos, Edilberto.
French: variant of   Gauthier  . This surname is also found in Spain (mainly Cádiz) and in the Dominican Republic. Compare   Gootee  .
History: This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

variants.name: Goucher
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a ditch, drain, or stream, from Middle English gote ‘watercourse’ + -ier, synonymous with Middle English atte Gote. This type of topographic name with the -(i)er suffix was common in Sussex and Kent.
occupational name for a goat herd, from Middle English gote ‘goat’ + the suffix -ier.

en.lifeSummary: When Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch was born in 1018, in Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Seigneur et Chatelain de Berghes Gobert III de Berghes-St. Winoch, was 35 and his mother, Avicie DE BOURBOURG, was 25. He had at least 1 daughter with Aélix DE THEROUANNE. He died in 1071, in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch est né en 1018, à Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Seigneur et Chatelain de Berghes Gobert III de Berghes-St. Winoch, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Avicie DE BOURBOURG, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Aélix DE THEROUANNE. Il est décédé en 1071, à Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch 1018 in Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Seigneur et Chatelain de Berghes Gobert III de Berghes-St. Winoch 35 und seine Mutter Avicie DE BOURBOURG 25. Er hatte mit Aélix DE THEROUANNE mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1071 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch è nato il nel 1018 nel Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Seigneur et Chatelain de Berghes Gobert III de Berghes-St. Winoch, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Avicie DE BOURBOURG, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Aélix DE THEROUANNE. Morì nel 1071, nel Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Wautier de Bergues-St. Winochが1018年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードバーグスで生まれた時，父Seigneur et Chatelain de Berghes Gobert III de Berghes-St. Winochは35歳，母Avicie DE BOURBOURGは25歳であった。彼はAélix DE THEROUANNEとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1071年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスビーウメトズ-ルeス-ロジェズで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch(이)가 1018년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 버구스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Seigneur et Chatelain de Berghes Gobert III de Berghes-St. Winoch(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Avicie DE BOURBOURG(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Aélix DE THEROUANNE(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1071년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 보멧즈-e스-로그스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch nasceu em 1018, em Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Seigneur et Chatelain de Berghes Gobert III de Berghes-St. Winoch, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Avicie DE BOURBOURG, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Aélix DE THEROUANNE. Ele faleceu em 1071, em Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch родился в 1018 г. в местности биргуесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Seigneur et Chatelain de Berghes Gobert III de Berghes-St. Winoch было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Avicie DE BOURBOURG, 25. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Aélix DE THEROUANNE. Он умер в 1071 г. в местности бомец-лeс-логесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wautier de Bergues-St. Winoch nació en 1018, en Bergues, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Seigneur et Chatelain de Berghes Gobert III de Berghes-St. Winoch, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Avicie DE BOURBOURG, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Aélix DE THEROUANNE. Murió en 1071, en Beaumetz-lès-Loges, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 53 años.
